long_description: PotatoStream is a Moonlight game streaming client for all 3DS and 2DS models, with a focus on Old 3DS/2DS compatibility. Auto-detects hardware at startup and activates "Potato" mode on older models with smart frame skipping, Y2RU hardware pipeline and an optimized stream profile (400x240@24fps). (New 3DS keeps the standard MVD hardware decoder) Compatible with Sunshine and NVIDIA GameStream.
